programme.title: News 4 NY at 7
programme.desc: Stay informed with the breaking news and headlines.

programme.title: Access Hollywood
programme.desc: Two big coast-to-coast premieres: "The Devil Wears Prada 2" and "Michael"; Universal Studios theme park exclusive with Kpop sensations Monsta X.

programme.title: Live: NBA Basketball
programme.desc: The San Antonio Spurs tip off against the Portland Trail Blazers in Game 2 of the West first round at Frost Bank Center. The Spurs lead 1-0 after a 111-98 win. Victor Wembanyama had 35 points; Deni Avdija had 30 points and 10 rebounds.

programme.title: Live: NBA Basketball
programme.desc: The Lakers host the Rockets in Game 2 of their Western Conference first-round series. Los Angeles holds a 1-0 lead after winning the opener without Luka Dončić. Houston looks to even the series as Kevin Durant deals with a bruised right knee.

programme.title: Live: News 4 NY at 11
programme.desc: Local and regional news.

programme.desc: This early-morning news covers overnight events, breaking domestic and international news as well as a preview of the day's anticipated events. The program also presents regular reports from the worlds of business, entertainment and sports.
